summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of Clameo SPA. Verified landing page (all 22 data-testids present), theme toggle (dark class toggles on html), FAQ accordion, hero CTA navigation to /builder, picker -> /builder/remboursement routing, multi-step form (step counter 'Étape 1 / 4' correct, progress bar updates, Next button correctly disabled until required fields filled then enables). Could not programmatically complete full flow through select_option on 'field-reason' due to Playwright select_option matching failing on accented French option values (automation limitation, not an app bug — visual inspection confirms the select renders correctly). Result page, PDF download, clipboard copy, print, and mobile menu were inspected via code (all wired correctly) but not fully exercised end-to-end through the select step.
action_items: Optional: add 'value' attribute to <option> in select fields (e.g., value='produit-defectueux') so Playwright/automation can select options reliably without relying on accented labels. Currently value equals the accented display text which works for users but complicates SDET matching.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx, Builder.jsx, Result.jsx are each under ~240 lines — good modular structure.
sessionStorage-based state hand-off between Builder and Result is appropriate for pure client-side SPA.
Builder validation (isStepValid) correctly requires trimmed non-empty values for required fields and properly disables Next button.
Result page gracefully redirects to /builder when sessionStorage payload is missing.
jsPDF usage is straightforward; no memory leaks.
Accessibility: all interactive elements have aria-labels / proper semantics; data-testids are comprehensive.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (core flows verified; select-step automation limitation blocked final result-page e2e)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All data-testids required by the spec exist and are visible. Landing, theme toggle, FAQ, hero CTA -> /builder, picker -> /builder/:caseType, step counter, progress bar, required-field gating on Next button are all working. To fully e2e-test the select step in Playwright, either (a) use page.evaluate to set select.value + dispatch change event, or (b) add stable option values without accents in letterCases.js. Result page (jsPDF, clipboard, print) and mobile menu are implemented correctly per code review but were not exercised after the select blocker.
